title: Jujutsu Kaisen: Character Randomizer
description: A character randomizer for the 'Jujutsu Craft' mod by Orca-San. Every (customizable time) it randomizes your character/abilities.
body:
**This mod is an Add-On for the Jujutsu Craft Mod by Orca-San:**
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sorceryfight

It randomizes the character you are playing as every set amount of time, changing all of your abilities.
Says the character you randomized into in chat.

Important Commands:

**/jjrandom time 10/3600** The amount of time in seconds between each randomization.

**/jjrandom toggle** Turns the randomizer on/off.

**/jjrandom info** Shows you the current randomizer settings.

**/jjrandom reset** Resets the randomizer to it's default settings.

If you're a creator, feel free to use the mod, just give credit! 👍
